mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, email, phone, department, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
